role: This directory contains the core metadata, indexing configuration, and architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these components define the structural identity, provenance tracking, and policy enforcement framework that enables the system to index, validate, and document source files and project structure.

children.role: Defines the structural metadata and indexing provenance for a source directory within the ArchSpine repository.
Manifest index file for ArchSpine Atlas, recording the current state of indexed source files and their associated documentation.
Defines the semantic identity, indexing pipeline configuration, and provenance metadata for the ArchSpine project knowledge graph.
Definitions of architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine mirror system, specifying policy constraints on code structure and dependencies.
An architectural governance rule that enforces separation of concerns by prohibiting direct imports of database adapters from application services.
Metadata document for the authentication source file, describing its identity, structure, semantics, and constraints to support system indexing and validation.
